system.description: Based on techniques taught for ground engagements using automatic weapons, the Frontline Style emphasizes the quality of quantity.

benefit.description: You ignore the -2 penalty to hit while hip-firing. You can arm and throw a grenade in a single Major Action.
benefit.name: Going In Hot

finalSecret.description: Using Footwork for advantageous position, you get +2 Defense or Ranged. You also get a Bonus Die to evade explosions.
finalSecret.name: Take Cover

system.weaponry: Blaster carbine, blast cannon, shotgun, repeating rifle, or submachine gun
